name: unhcrwash
description: This is a dataset on WASH indicators in refugee camps and settlements. The data was collected from the UNHCR Information Management System (IRIS) and was available on the UNHCR WASH dashboard. This dataset includes data from 227 sites and 36 countries. The source dashboard has since been retired, so this dataset is a fixed historical snapshot (2013 to 2024) that can no longer be regenerated.

publisher.name: openwashdata @ Global Health Engineering, ETH Zurich

keywords: refugee camps, unhcr, wash indicators, iris
